summary: Vertical home video, watermarked 'truckingalongwithtay,' of a young woman seated at a wooden table opening a piece of mail. She wears a light t-shirt and reacts with a hand over her mouth while holding a photograph and a printed letter; an opened envelope, a black folder, and a framed item sit on the table. The audio is family members narrating that she had mailed a graduation announcement to the White House and received a reply with a note and a signed photo. No music bed.

script.scene: Young woman at a table reacts with hand over mouth, holding a photo and a letter; opened envelope and folder on the table; watermark 'truckingalongwithtay.'
